title: Secrets Revealed In RoE 111
wikitext:
[]: Secrets Revealed In RoE 1.11             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Thu Apr 22, 2010 8:34 am One I noticed was we finally get to see just why those glasses were cracked on Rei's night stand and confirmed they were Gendo's which was sorta apparent already, as I believe his glasses in the first few eps were not the orange ones anyway. Anyone have more details they were uncovered in 1.11 that reveal things not seen / explained before? I am also searching for a differences thread concerning animation detail / animation sequences / dialogue etc between the series and this film. Not just chit chat but on depth look.

[]: Re: Secrets Revealed In RoE 1.11             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Apr 22, 2010 8:42 am ProfessorKaos64 wrote: One I noticed was we finally get to see just why those glasses were cracked on Rei's night stand and confirmed they were Gendo's which was sorta apparent already, as I believe his glasses in the first few eps were not the orange ones anyway.

[]: Re: Secrets Revealed In RoE 1.11             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Apr 22, 2010 8:49 am ProfessorKaos64 wrote: I am also searching for a differences thread concerning animation detail / animation sequences / dialogue etc between the series and this film. Not just chit chat but on depth look.

[]:             Quote Post by ProfessorKaos64 » Thu Apr 22, 2010 8:50 am I kinda saw it was, but there was a visual confirmation of it this time in the training chamber. But anyway, any noticeable key changes people noticed? Im still looking for some in depth thread that goes though them. I really LOVED the detail in many of the scenes they added and how they blended the regular animation with CG at times. A lot of small details made this film very enjoyable.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Apr 22, 2010 2:42 pm ProfessorKaos64 wrote: I kinda saw it was, but there was a visual confirmation of it this time in the training chamber.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Apr 22, 2010 2:46 pm The best example I can think of that may be relevant is that when Shinji rushes to catch the fallen-off-tray Rei after the rocks fall, we still see Gendo smirking. NGE leads you to think he's smirking because Unit 01 saved Shinji by shielding him from the rubble, which doesn't occur in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 22, 2010 2:51 pm Naw: I figured Gendo is still smirking in 1.0 because of the whole "Yes, dance puppets dance!" mentality he still has... Which would work (sort of) still work for Yui-sama reacting to the rubble. But yeah, it could also have to do with his 1.0 babblings of implying that Rei and Shinji need to get close for his plans.

Anyone have more details they were uncovered in 1.11 that reveal things not seen / explained
